betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The §6Crystals§f (advancedrocketry:crystal) is a §6multi-block item family§f representing the §6rare crystal materials§f found on alien planets. Crystals come in §68 colors§f (advancedrocketry:crystal:0 through :7), each with unique properties — §6red crystals§f power the §6Vacuum Laser Emitter§f (10014), §6blue crystals§f enable advanced circuit production, and §6yellow crystals§f are the §6energy source§f for the §6Solar Generator§f chain.

§6Production Path (multiple sources)§f:
- Source 1: §6Geode Block§f (advancedrocketry:geode, quest 10076) can be §6mined directly§f for 4-8 random-color crystals
- Source 2: §6Crystallizer§f (advancedrocketry:crystallizer, quest 10006) processes geodes into §6specific crystal colors§f based on input material
- Source 3: §6Asteroid Mining Mission§f (chain) yields §6rare crystal types§f in orbit
- Source 4: §6Lava Planet Mining§f yields §6yellow crystals§f specifically
- The block name in en_US.lang is `advancement.crystalline` for the §6Crystalline§f advancement — the blocks themselves are the §6crystal:0–7 family§f

The §6Crystals§f quest is a prerequisite for the §6Charcoal Log§f (10078) and the §6Vacuum Laser Emitter§f (10014) — the §6optical crystal production chain§f. Crystals are also the §6energy core§f for the §6Solar Generator§f chain and the §6Lens Block§f (10013) production.

This quest is the §6midpoint§f of the alien planet material questline. Once you have crystals, you can build the §6Vacuum Laser Emitter§f (10014) and the §6Precision Laser Etcher§f (10015), which unlock the §6advanced circuits§f (ic:2) and the §6Satellite Builder§f (10039).

§eTip§f: Stockpile §6red crystals§f (advancedrocketry:crystal:3) for the §6Vacuum Laser Emitter§f recipe — they are the §6bottleneck ingredient§f. Use a §6Crystallizer§f (10006) to convert other crystal colors to red by adding §6redstone dust§f. Blue crystals are best for the §6Astrobody Data Processor§f (10020) data storage.
